description_long: This bird has a compact, rounded body with dark brown to black plumage covering most of its back and wings. Its underparts and flanks are marked with bold white stripes and bars, creating a striking contrast against the darker feathers. The head features a prominent white facial stripe running from the beak over the eye, and a red eye ring that matches its reddish beak and legs. The beak is straight and slightly tapered, well-suited for probing. The legs are slender and pinkish-red, adapted for walking on the ground. The tail is short and rounded, blending smoothly with the body.
description: A compact, dark bird with bold white stripes on its underparts, a red beak and legs, and a distinctive white facial stripe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's white facial stripe, red beak, and the striped pattern on its flanks and underparts.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded body, short tail, and the symmetry of the wing and back feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same facial and flank striping, with the red beak and legs visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the red beak, white facial stripes, and the symmetry of the bird's head and chest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: bold white stripes and bars on underparts and flanks, solid dark upperparts, white facial stripe
